subject: Geography
title: Mapping the Ocean Floor
description: A fast breakdown of Mapping the Ocean Floor for builders.

hook.text: We've mapped the surface of Mars in more detail than Earth's ocean floor.

buildup.text: Sonar sends sound waves to the bottom and times the echo to measure depth.

discovery.text: Only about 25% of the ocean floor has been mapped at high resolution.

twist.text: MH370's search mapped more of the Indian Ocean floor than all previous surveys combined.

climax.text: The Seabed 2030 project aims to map the entire ocean floor by the end of this decade.

punchline.text: We know more about Mars than our own ocean floor.

quiz.question: How much of Earth's ocean floor has been mapped in high resolution?
